basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-May-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit 28 years, relaxable for SC/ST/PWD/Female (5 years) and OBC (3 years).
age_limit.details: Upper age limit: 28 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in Electrical Engineering (with GATE Qualified) OR Electrical & Electronics Engineering (with GATE Qualified) with CGPA of 7.0 or 65% marks OR B.Tech/B.E in Electrical Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with M.Tech/M.E in Electrical Engineering or a closely related discipline with at least 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks.
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E in Electrical Engineering (with GATE Qualified) OR Electrical & Electronics Engineering (with GATE Qualified) with CGPA of 7.0 or 65% marks from a recognized Technical Institute/University B.Tech/B.E in Electrical Engineering/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with M.Tech/M.E in Electrical Engineering or a closely related discipline with at least 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from a recognized Technical Institute/University Experience in power system simulation tools (PSCAD/MATLAB) and real-time/HIL testing platforms, Strong scientific writing and documentation skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000/- per month for Year 1 & 2, INR 42,000/- per month for Year 3
salary_details.details: Year 1 & 2: INR 37,000/- per month Year 3: INR 42,000/- per month

selection_process: Short listing based on merit and need of the project Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-May-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela is 25-May-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering with GATE qualification and a minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% marks, or a B.Tech/B.E with M.Tech/M.E in a related discipline with at least 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the JRF application?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is 28 years, with relaxations available for SC/ST/PWD/Female (5 years) and OBC (3 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send a single PDF file containing your filled application and relevant documents to the specified email addresses.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITR/SR/ 2026 / Advt.- 26EE012 /L/017.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job.

faq.question: Q9. What are the required skills or experience for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Experience in power system simulation tools like PSCAD/MATLAB and real-time/HIL testing platforms, along with strong scientific writing skills, is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
